description: Ground-truth eval set over the 5 test articles. `must_include` are lowercase substrings the answer should surface; `deep` flags facts buried mid-document (tables / late sections) that specifically stress chunk-boundary quality.

questions.question: What are the two ways to connect Google Meet hardware to OptiSigns, and which is recommended?
What Google admin scopes does the OptiSigns service account need for Google Meet hardware?
How do I connect Zoom Rooms to OptiSigns?
How do I set up a YouTube Dashboard app in OptiSigns?
My screen is not turning on/off at the scheduled time. How do I troubleshoot?
Is RS-232 or HDMI-CEC more reliable for operational scheduling?
Which OptiSigns plan is required to use HDMI-CEC or RS-232 operational scheduling?
How do I create an operational schedule for a screen?
